# LangChain Official Integration Mastery

This mastery hub synchronizes the **Official LangChain agentic skills** currently active in the `.ai/skills` system. It provides the elite protocols for building complex, multi-stage agentic chains and memory-intensive workflows.

## 🛠️ Synced System Capabilities
The following skills are linked directly to the executable `.ai/skills` directory:

### Chain Orchestration
- **langchain-skills**: Comprehensive suite of Official LangChain protocols for LCEL (LangChain Expression Language), tool-calling, and stateful orchestration.

## 🔗 Integrated Sub-Skills (Complete List)

To invoke any of these synced skills within a project, use the corresponding slash command mapped in the system router.
